title: cyanea megacarpa
intro: Cyanea megacarpa, also known as Hawaiian hibiscus or mau loa, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing skin irritations, as well as promoting cardiovascular health. Cyanea megacarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments.
